features.name: queue append via array index
features.description: Code should include appending to a queue by assigning to an out-of-bounds index using array-style access

features.name: queue append with direct assignment
features.description: Code should include assigning a value to a queue at an index beyond current size to trigger auto-append

features.name: queue of queues via array index
features.description: Code should include appending to a queue of queues using multi-dimensional array-style access

features.name: bounded queue no-grow via array index
features.description: Code should include assigning to a bounded queue via array index at exactly the max size to verify no auto-append occurs
